title: Flora Walker Enchantment
description: This mod adds a simple new enchantment called flora walker thats fertilize where you walk
body:
This mod adds a simple new enchantment called flora walker thats fertilize where you walk. 

It has 2 level, at first level the flowers are more rare and the aaplied bonemeal is not garanteed. At level 2 the chances increase

You can find it in villagers trade and random loots as well as applied on mobs gears
